name: Do I need a lawyer for my simple work sprain claim in Boise?
description: Maybe not for simple, but yes if denied or complex.[3][9]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my simple work sprain claim in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe not for simple, but yes if denied or complex.[3][9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not always for minor accepted claims, but recommended if disputed, complex, or denied—lawyers boost settlements 20-40% typically.[3][9] Free consults common.[1] Key factors: Insurers lowball without rep; handle appeals, negotiations. Practical guidance: If benefits delayed or cut, hire one—no win no fee. Self-represent simple cases via commission resources.[2] Better safe for max benefits.
